hero.title: Villa Los Palmitos of Cartagena
hero.description: A complete vacation home for 6 guests, with a private pool, open views, and direct booking with the host.

host.title: Direct attention, no middlemen
host.experience: Local host with 3 years of experience
host.description: Enrique personally manages this villa in Cartagena and maintains direct contact with every guest. Before confirming, he shares all stay information, rules, and conditions so you can book with total clarity.

trust_highlights.verified_host_sub: Personal treatment before and during your stay

gallery.title: Pool, calm and Mediterranean light
gallery.description: Tour the key spaces of the villa before requesting dates: exterior with views, resting areas, and rooms designed to disconnect as a group.

highlights.title: A private stay with a boutique hotel feel

privacy.title: Entire villa just for your group
privacy.description: No shared areas: pool, exterior, and rooms are reserved exclusively for your companions.

exterior.title: Pool with open views
exterior.description: A main space for slow breakfasts, sunny afternoons, and quiet nights outdoors.

comfort.title: Comfortable layout for 6
comfort.description: 3 bedrooms, 3 beds, and 2 bathrooms so every room works spaciously.

1.author: Marta and family
1.text: Spotless house, spectacular outdoor area, and very transparent management from the first message.

2.author: Carlos, group trip
2.text: Clear booking process, well-explained contract, and check-in without surprises. Very professional.

3.author: Ana and Diego
3.text: It gave us a lot of confidence to receive all the information in advance and direct contact at all times.

1.title: Date request
1.description: Send us your dates and number of guests. We reply with availability confirmation in less than 24 hours.

2.title: Validation and contract
2.description: You receive a summary of the stay, cancellation policy, and temporary rental contract to review before payment.

3.title: Protected payment and access
3.description: Payment is made through a secure gateway with an automatic receipt. After payment, we confirm check-in and arrival details.

safety_legal.kicker: Your peace of mind comes first
safety_legal.title: Safety and rules
safety_legal.cancellation_text: Free cancellation up to 14 days before arrival. Check the details in the booking contract.

1.question: How is the payment made securely?
1.answer: We work with verified bank transfers or a gateway with confirmation. We never request payments through untraceable channels.

2.question: What documentation do I receive before paying?
2.answer: You will receive complete details of the booking, conditions, cancellation policy, and temporary rental contract.

3.question: How can I avoid fraud attempts?
3.answer: Always confirm you are speaking through our official channels and check that the billing account matches the one in the contract.

cta.title: Your private stay in Cartagena begins with a clear consultation.
cta.description: We will send you availability, conditions, and contract before payment. No intermediary commissions and with direct contact throughout the process.
